title: Image Classification with Contextual Information
scenario: Write a prompt that will classify an image of a kitchen with a pre-trained model, incorporating contextual information about the image (e.g., time of day, location). The output should include the classified image and a brief description of the scene. The prompt must be in a style that is understandable by a human but executable by a bot. The classification model should prioritize indoor scenes.
constraints: Must use pre-trained model for image classification
Must include contextual information in the prompt

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the classification model used accurate for indoor scenes?
Does the prompt include contextual information about the image?
Is the output in markdown format and within the 50-character limit for the species name?
Is the prompt understandable by a human but executable by a bot?
